dataset_title: Experimental Dataset and Servo Motor Modeling for the Quadruped Robot TWINIA
description: This dataset contains experimental measurements used for the identification and validation of servo motor dynamics in the quadruped robot TWINIA. The experiments were developed during a doctoral internship and include theoretical modeling, real robot approximation, simulation-based validation in NVIDIA Omniverse Isaac Sim, and energy system analysis using INA219 sensors and supercapacitor-assisted power support.

research_context.project: Digital Twins and Physical Artificial Intelligence for Mobile Robotics
research_context.objective: To reduce the sim-to-real gap through servo motor identification, actuator model validation, and digital twin integration.

experimental_workflow: Theoretical mathematical modeling of servo motors
Approximation of model parameters using real robot measurements
Validation in NVIDIA Omniverse Isaac Sim
Detection of high current demand during simulation
Proposal of hardware improvements using supercapacitors and INA219 sensing modules

sensors.name: INA219
sensors.purpose: Monitoring current consumption and voltage drop detection

variables.name: test_type
variables.description: Type of excitation test applied to the servo motor

variables.name: platform
variables.description: Source platform of the data (real robot, simulation, analysis)

variables.name: power_system
variables.description: Power configuration used during the test

variables.name: current_sensor
variables.description: Sensor used for current and voltage acquisition

variables.name: velocity_deg_s
variables.description: Angular velocity in degrees per second

test_files.test_description: Step response experiment for transient analysis
Second step response experiment for repeatability validation
Ramp input experiment for continuous motion analysis
Second ramp input experiment for repeatability validation
Chirp excitation experiment for frequency response analysis
Second chirp experiment for repeatability validation

repository_structure.scripts: Python scripts for analysis and visualization

citation: Cordero Pareja, J. A., López Sotelo, J. A., & Carreño Zagarra, J. J. (2026). Experimental Dataset and Servo Motor Modeling for the Quadruped Robot TWINIA. GitHub Repository.
